description: Fix critical issues from comprehensive 5-agent review: security hardening, architecture fixes, product gaps, UX polish. Priority order: security > architecture > product > UX.

userStories.title: Remove hardcoded defaultValue credentials from api_constants.dart
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/shared/core/constants/api_constants.dart
Remove defaultValue parameter from supabaseUrl String.fromEnvironment
Remove defaultValue parameter from supabaseAnonKey String.fromEnvironment
Build must fail loudly if --dart-define-from-file=.env is not passed
Verify no other hardcoded Supabase URLs or keys exist in lib/
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: The defaultValue bakes live credentials into every compiled binary. Remove them so the build fails without --dart-define-from-file=.env. The .env file itself is gitignored.

userStories.title: Add column-level REVOKE on plan_tier and onboarding_completed
acceptanceCriteria: Create supabase/migrations/20260329000001_revoke_sensitive_columns.sql
REVOKE UPDATE (plan_tier) ON public.wt_users FROM authenticated
REVOKE UPDATE (onboarding_completed) ON public.wt_users FROM authenticated
Remove FreemiumRepository.updatePlanTier() from Flutter client — plan tier must only change server-side
Verify onboarding completion still works (it should use service role via Edge Function or trigger)
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Currently any authenticated user can set plan_tier='pro' via Supabase REST API. The UPDATE RLS policy has no column restriction. Fix with column-level REVOKE.

userStories.title: Add OAuth state parameter for CSRF protection
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/features/health/presentation/health_connections_provider.dart
Read lib/app.dart deep link handler
Generate cryptographically random state value (min 128 bits) before initiating OAuth
Store state in flutter_secure_storage or a StateProvider
Pass state as query parameter in both Garmin and Strava authorization URLs
In deep link callback, verify returned state matches stored value before calling connect
Reject and log if state mismatch
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Without a state parameter, an attacker can craft a malicious deep link that links their Strava/Garmin account to the victim's WellTrack profile.

userStories.title: Fix Edge Function security: userClient key, webhook fallbacks, process-webhooks auth
acceptanceCriteria: Read supabase/functions/_shared/supabase-client.ts
Change userClient to use SUPABASE_ANON_KEY instead of service role key
Read supabase/functions/webhook-garmin/index.ts
Change missing GARMIN_CONSUMER_SECRET from return true to return false
Read supabase/functions/webhook-strava/index.ts and oauth-strava/index.ts
Remove hardcoded WELLTRACK_STRAVA_2026 fallback — function must reject if STRAVA_VERIFY_TOKEN not set
Read supabase/functions/process-webhooks/index.ts
Add service-role JWT check at function entry — reject unauthorized requests
Cap batchSize to maximum of 50
userStories.technicalNotes: Multiple Edge Function security gaps found by security audit. Fix all in one story.

userStories.title: Add refreshListenable to GoRouter for reactive auth guard re-evaluation
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/shared/core/router/app_router.dart
Create a GoRouterRefreshStream or ChangeNotifier that wraps the Supabase auth state stream
Pass it as refreshListenable to GoRouter constructor
When auth state changes (logout, session expiry), router automatically re-evaluates redirect
Test: user on a protected route when session expires should be redirected to /login
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Currently ref.read(authStateProvider) is a snapshot that doesn't trigger re-evaluation. GoRouter needs a Listenable to reactively re-check guards.

userStories.title: Fix ref.watch in async bodies to ref.read in today_nutrition_provider.dart
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/features/meals/presentation/today_nutrition_provider.dart
Find all ref.watch() calls inside async FutureProvider bodies
Change ref.watch() after any await to ref.read()
Keep ref.watch() calls that are before the first await (these are fine for subscription setup)
Verify todayNutritionDashboardProvider still composes correctly
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: ref.watch inside async bodies does not re-subscribe after await. Riverpod docs require ref.read after async gaps. ~15 instances to fix.

userStories.title: Surface DashboardState.errorMessage in the UI
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/features/dashboard/presentation/dashboard_screen.dart
Read lib/features/dashboard/presentation/dashboard_provider.dart for errorMessage field
When dashboardProvider state has a non-null errorMessage, show a dismissable error banner or SnackBar
Error should use user-friendly text, not raw exception strings
Dismissing the error clears it from state
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: DashboardState.errorMessage is set in DashboardNotifier but nothing reads it. Errors are silently swallowed.

userStories.title: Add Recovery Score card to top of dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/features/dashboard/presentation/dashboard_screen.dart
Read lib/features/dashboard/presentation/widgets/recovery_score_dashboard_card.dart
Insert RecoveryScoreDashboardCard as the first or second section after the header
Card should show today's recovery score with color coding and trend arrow
During 14-day calibration, show progress indicator (Day X of 14)
Free users see teased score (number visible but breakdown locked)
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: The widget exists and is wired to real data but is not in DashboardScreen. This is the app's core differentiator — must be prominent.

userStories.title: Fix decimal input in onboarding height/weight fields
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/features/profile/presentation/onboarding/onboarding_flow_screen.dart
Find height and weight TextFormField inputs
Replace FilteringTextInputFormatter.digitsOnly with a formatter that allows decimal points
Use TextInputType.numberWithOptions(decimal: true) for keyboard type
Add validation: weight 20-500 kg, height 50-280 cm
Disable Continue button when required fields are empty or invalid
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: digitsOnly strips the decimal point — 75.5 kg becomes 755. Also Continue button is always enabled even with empty fields.

userStories.title: Add display name field to onboarding QuickProfileScreen
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/features/profile/presentation/onboarding/ for QuickProfileScreen or the biometrics step
Add a 'Display Name' text field (first name or preferred name)
Save to wt_profiles or wt_users (whichever has a display_name column)
Dashboard greeting should use this name instead of email prefix
Field is required — cannot proceed without entering a name
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Currently dashboard shows 'Good morning, john.doe' derived from email. Need a proper name.

userStories.title: Wire scheduleNotification to reminder creation UI path
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/features/reminders/data/notification_service.dart for scheduleNotification method
Read lib/features/reminders/ for the reminder creation flow
After ReminderRepository.createReminder() succeeds, call NotificationService.scheduleNotification()
Pass the reminder's time, repeat rule, title, and deep-link payload
Verify a test reminder actually fires as a device notification
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: NotificationService is fully implemented but scheduleNotification() is never called from the create-reminder path. The handoff is missing.

userStories.title: Replace hardcoded top:60 with SafeArea and fix horizontal padding consistency
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/features/dashboard/presentation/dashboard_screen.dart
Replace top:60 padding with SafeArea or MediaQuery.paddingOf(context).top
Standardize all horizontal padding to a single value (20dp recommended)
Fix weight_trend_chart_widget.dart, habit_streak_prompt_card.dart, discover_quick_access_grid.dart to match
Fix _GoalsSummaryCard, DailyCoachCard padding to match
Dashboard should have a consistent left edge on scroll
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Currently mixed 16dp/24dp horizontal padding creates jagged left edge. Header uses hardcoded top:60 which clips on notch devices.

userStories.title: Fix dark theme color consistency — replace light-mode pastels and raw Colors.*
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/features/dashboard/presentation/widgets/habit_streak_prompt_card.dart
Replace Color(0xFFFFF3E0), Color(0xFFE8F5E9), Color(0xFFFCE4EC) with AppColors equivalents at 10% alpha
Read lib/features/dashboard/presentation/widgets/overtraining_warning_card.dart
Replace Colors.orange.shade50/300/900 with AppColors.warning at appropriate alpha levels
Read lib/features/dashboard/presentation/widgets/recovery_score_dashboard_card.dart
Replace Colors.green/yellow/orange/red with AppColors.recoveryExcellent/Good/Moderate/Low/Critical
Read lib/features/dashboard/presentation/widgets/daily_coach_card.dart
Replace any Colors.green/amber/red with AppColors tokens
All cards should look native to the dark Obsidian Vitality theme
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Light-mode pastel backgrounds create bright 'white islands' in the dark theme. AppColors has recovery color tokens defined but unused.

userStories.title: Fix touch targets, semantics, and accessibility gaps
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/features/dashboard/presentation/dashboard_screen.dart
Replace GestureDetector + Container on bloodwork card with Material + InkWell + Semantics(button: true)
Fix goal status badge fontSize from 9 to AppTypography.labelSmall (11sp minimum)
Read lib/features/habits/presentation/habits_screen.dart
Expand habit toggle from 36dp to 48dp minimum touch target
Read lib/features/dashboard/presentation/widgets/macro_rings_carousel_page.dart
Add Semantics(label: 'Protein: X of Y grams') to each macro ring
Read lib/features/dashboard/presentation/widgets/steps_summary_tile.dart
Replace GestureDetector 'Connect' CTA with TextButton (48dp target)
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Multiple WCAG violations: sub-48dp touch targets, missing semantic labels, no ink feedback on interactive elements.

userStories.title: Resolve FAB + Log tab overlap and fix nav bar styling
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/shared/core/router/scaffold_with_bottom_nav.dart
Remove the 'Log' BottomNavigationBarItem since FAB subsumes it
Update branch indexes: Home(0), Workouts(1), Profile(2)
Or alternatively move FAB to endFloat position if Log tab must stay
Add top border to BottomNavigationBar for visual separation
Add fontWeight distinction: selected w700, unselected w400
Fix AppBar titleTextStyle from 28sp to titleLarge (22sp) in app_theme.dart dark theme
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: FAB at centerFloat overlaps the Log nav item. Either remove Log tab (cleaner) or reposition FAB. Also nav bar has no visual separator against dark content.

userStories.title: Fix BackdropFilter performance and shimmer loading skeleton
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/features/dashboard/presentation/widgets/steps_summary_tile.dart
Read lib/features/dashboard/presentation/widgets/exercise_summary_tile.dart
Remove BackdropFilter from both — use solid container color instead
Add no-data state to ExerciseSummaryTile showing '-- kcal' when exercise is null (matching steps pattern)
Read lib/features/dashboard/presentation/widgets/shimmer_loading.dart
Rebuild DashboardShimmer to match actual 2025 dashboard: header -> 180dp carousel -> 2 tiles -> chart -> card -> grid
Make ShimmerBox self-animating or ensure it's always used inside DashboardShimmer
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: BackdropFilter forces compositing layer repaints on every scroll frame — 3-5ms per frame hit on mid-range Android. Shimmer skeleton has wrong layout causing CLS-equivalent jump.

userStories.title: Fix carousel height consistency and add greeting time awareness
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/features/dashboard/presentation/widgets/nutrition_summary_carousel.dart
Unify loading, zero-state, and data heights to 180dp consistently
Read lib/features/dashboard/presentation/dashboard_screen.dart header section
Replace hardcoded 'Good morning,' with time-aware greeting (morning/afternoon/evening)
A _greeting() helper already exists in daily_coach_card.dart — reuse or extract to shared utils
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Carousel has 180dp data, 160dp loading, 160dp zero — causing 20dp layout jump on state transition.

userStories.title: Move weight log Supabase call into repository and replace MD5 with SHA-256
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/features/health/presentation/screens/weight_log_screen.dart
Move the Supabase upsert call into HealthRepository (add a logWeight method)
Screen should call the repository via a provider, not Supabase directly
Replace md5.convert with sha256.convert for dedupe_hash (per CLAUDE.md spec)
Also check lib/features/health/data/health_normalizer.dart for MD5 usage and replace
Show previous weight above the input ('Last logged: 82.4 kg on Mar 27')
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Direct Supabase call from screen violates architecture, bypasses offline-first, and is untestable. MD5 is cryptographically broken — use SHA-256 per project spec.

userStories.title: Add freemium tier check to GoRouter redirect for Pro-only routes
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/shared/core/router/app_router.dart redirect callback
Define a list of Pro-only route prefixes: /insights, /daily-coach/plan, /recovery-detail
In the redirect callback, check currentPlanTierProvider for these routes
If user is free tier and navigating to a Pro route, redirect to /paywall
Verify free users can still access all free features
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Currently router only checks auth + onboarding. A free user who knows the route paths can access /insights directly. Defense-in-depth alongside widget-level FreemiumGate.

userStories.title: Fix email validation on login and raise password minimum to 8 characters
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/features/auth/presentation/login_screen.dart email validator
Replace contains('@') check with proper regex matching signup screen pattern
Read lib/features/auth/presentation/signup_screen.dart password validator
Raise minimum from 6 to 8 characters
Update error message to match
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Login accepts '@' as valid email. Password min 6 is below NIST SP 800-63B standard of 8 for apps handling sensitive health data.
